rulings.Case Title: LISA J. BAILLY-SOLWAY ET AL VS. HILARY C. PIERCE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notion Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday May 2, 2018, line 1. CROSS COMPLAINANT HILARY PIERCE Notion Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Amended Cross-Complaint GRANTED. Parties to agree on a continued trial date. Amended Cross-Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. The Court does not make any ruling regarding the merits or sufficiency of allegations in the proposed Amended Cross-Complaint. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: REBECCA FOX VS. PEARL STREET VENTURES LLC
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday May 2, 2018, line 2. DEFENDANT PEARL STREET VENTURES LLC, BRIT HAHN, BARSHA PROPERTIES LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for Tenant Harassment, Fraud and Negligent Misrepresentation. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: REBECCA FOX VS. PEARL STREET VENTURES LLC
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday May 2, 2018, line 2. DEFENDANT PEARL STREET VENTURES LLC, BRIT HAHN, BARSHA PROPERTIES LLC MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. Request for Punitive Damages is sufficiently stated. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTINE A. BENNETT VS. THOMAS LUCAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Thomas Lucas, Trustee'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 2, 2018, Line 3. Defendant Thomas Lucas, Trustee's Demurrer To Complaint. Sustained without leave to amend. All of Plaintiff's claims arise out of internal Trust matters, interpretation and validity of Trust documents, and collateral attack on prior Probate Court orders. Additionally, it appears that Ms. Bennett has no standing to bring these claims in a civil action. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: YIWU JIANG VS. INEZ ESTRADA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 2, 2018, Line 4. Status Report Re: Settlement. Status Report. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: DENNIS L. VENTURONI ET AL VS. STEVEN MARTIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 2, 2018, Line 5. DEFENDANT STEVEN MARTIN'S Motion To Compel Compliance. No later than 9:00 a.m. on May 2, 2018 parties to file and provide a courtesy copy of a joint statement listing all discovery items (Set One) subject to this motion and not addressed (directly or otherwise) by the motion heard on April 12, 2018. =(501/AJR)
